---
title: "GAMMA"
generated: true
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GAMMA -->
```python
GAMMA = Family(name='gamma', has_fixed_dispersion=False, link=_log_link, linkinv=_safe_exp, mu_eta=_safe_exp, variance=(lambda mu: mu * mu), unit_deviance=_gamma_deviance, init_mu=(lambda y: jnp.clip(y, _EPS, None)), loglik=_gamma_loglik, eta_bound=_ETA_MAX)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:GAMMA -->
*TODO: describe this type alias / constant.*
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
